Package com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.connector.wrapped

Class WrappedUser

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.connector.wrapped.WrappedUser
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.saperion.jcs.modules.api.Wrapped<com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.User>, com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.TenantSpecificItem, com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.User, com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.UserManagementItem, Serializable
public class WrappedUser extends Object implements com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.User, com.saperion.jcs.modules.api.Wrapped<com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.User>
Wrapper used to enable lazy-loading of a user's groups.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • WrappedUser

      public WrappedUser(com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.User original, com.saperion.jcs.modules.users.api.UserService service, int token)
      Parameters:
      original - the original user to wrap
      service - the service instance used to load the goups
      token - the current token needed to authorize the call to load the groups
